block_01: What is one indicator that is known for its incredible efficiency and versatility? Of course, it is the Moving Average, that has 4 different types and endless possibilities of use. Specifically, the 50-period Exponential Moving Average is a popular trader’s choice, since it marks an important threshold and can give out multiple trading signals.
block_02: You can find support and resistance levels, breakout and reversal points using just one indicator — an approach, which is suitable for any type of trading, from Binary Options to Stocks or Forex. Try it for yourself and see how it works!
block_03: Check the full article to learn all about the 50-period Moving Average strategy.
